notes.note: Cicero's residence for most of his exile in 58 BC, in the household of the quaestor Plancius. Att 3.15 is the great central letter of the Thessalonican stretch (19 August 58 BC).
"Blind, blind, I say, we were" --- Cicero's reproach to Atticus and to himself for not foreseeing what Clodius would do; among the most-quoted self-reproaches in Roman letters.
